SEL

,WI.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY            
,'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG             
--,-999 PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT
,-999 AS RTNR_ID
,'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CD
,WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
,WI.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,WI.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE WI
/*INNER JOIN (SELECT DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY          ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT , LAST_RECORD_FLG           
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV GROUP BY 1,2,3) DRVD
ON DRVD.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY           = WI. REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG='Y' */
WHERE WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('IND_ADJ') 
--AND WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  NOT IN ('GL ADJUSTMENTS AS SUBSCRIPTION', 'GL ADJUSTMENTS - AS TRANSACTIO', 'R2A COGS')
--AND WI.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_OPEN_PERIOD WHERE OPEN_FLAG='Y')

/* AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_INV_REV_MEASURE SC
WHERE
WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=SC.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = SC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =SC.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ) */

AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_FIN SC
WHERE
WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=SC.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = SC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =SC.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD )

XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,

XCAT_FLG                      ,
BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            ,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           ,
ELA_FLG                       ,
ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,

DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,

FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MSR_SC_NET_CHANGE WI
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_FIN
--STGDB_TS1.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_SC1 
SC
WHERE
WI.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=SC.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = SC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =SC.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)

 $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SMR_SC1 BDL

WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY

,WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT

,WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT

,WI.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,WI.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE WI
/*INNER JOIN (SELECT DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY          ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT , LAST_RECORD_FLG           
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV GROUP BY 1,2,3) DRVD
ON DRVD.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY           = WI. REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG='Y' */
WHERE 1=1 -- and WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0
AND (WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('DRCT_AS_T')  OR( WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ' ) and WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  IN ('GL ADJUSTMENTS AS SUBSCRIPTION', 'GL ADJUSTMENTS - AS TRANSACTIO', 'R2A COGS')) )
--AND WI.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = ( SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS )
